mean_frequency_earthquakes.description: Mean frequency of large earthquakes capable of damaging important plant structures, used to compute the Poisson rate parameter for earthquakes over the 10-year period (λ = 0.2).

mean_frequency_winds.description: Mean frequency of damaging high winds, used to compute the Poisson rate parameter for winds over the 10-year period (λ = 0.4).

time_period.description: The 10-year period over which the probability of both strong winds and large earthquakes is calculated.
